---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: false
  feed: true
  date-format: "YYYY.MM.DD"
page-layout: full
comments: false
---


```{=html}
<div class="cro-divider"><span>Najnovije</span><span class="rule"></span></div>
```
